title: AdaptiveHUD
description: Adds FPS, light, coordinates etc directly on your screen! Endless customization! Variable-based!
body: ![AdaptiveHUD Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d43e8d5efce63ca141dba0a094c71ad713e806c1.png) ## Description [](https://discord.gg/tqn38v6w7k) [](https://adaptivehud.gitbook.io/) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) ![An example profile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3cc68a4f89c53a55ce65e83bdb15031f2b6bb56_0.webp) AdaptiveHUD is a highly customizable HUD mod, it is based on variables meaning you can make it display pretty much anything you want! From your current FPS to the amount of outgoing packets, anything is possible. While there are other mods like this, AdaptiveHUD gives you the ability to position these elements wherever you want (_through a dragging-screen_), you can change the padding, the background, the colors, shadows, scale and much more. When you create a new element you use variables to display what you want. For example you could enter something like `FPS: {fps}`, which then would display your current FPS like `FPS: 103`. The mod has many different variables, and you can find them all by checking out the [documentation](https://adaptivehud.gitbook.io/docs/docs/variables_docs). ## Why use this mod instead of other simular ones? While there are a few other mods like this, they all have some missing features that I would have liked. [**Minihud**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud): Lacks customization, while you can display a lot of information, you can't move each induvidually, it isn't variable based (meaning the text is set), also you can't change colors, scale, padding and such as easily. [**CustomHUD**](https://modrinth.com/mod/customhud): Not that user-friendly. While CustomHUD is able to scale, change colors and more, it isn't that easy to use since you must edit the files manually. CustomHUD also focuses more on paragraphs of text, while AdaptiveHUD has each variable as an individual element. ## Editing Screen ![Editing Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7662e1502b84a090fa2119de25a86f8151929f4.png) ## Moving Screen ![Dragging Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5698f5fb1bce97ab4f7e2077aae8c437f47de255_0.webp) The mod is currently only available for Fabric, but might get ported to other loaders in the future.
